title: primula glomerata
intro: Primula glomerata, also known as the clustered primrose, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Primula glomerata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
